FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct TextEditState

Namespace
FluentGpu.Scene
Assembly
FluentGpu.Scene.dll

Sparse text-edit state for an editor's TEXT node (side-table, O(editors)): caret geometry + caret-follow scroll + in-flight IME composition span + focus/blink flags. Written by the editing control (UI thread, edit/drag time) and the CaretBlinker phase-7 ticker; the recorder only READS it (plus the pooled decoration rects on SetTextEditRects(NodeHandle, ReadOnlySpan<RectF>, ReadOnlySpan<RectF>)) to emit selection highlight / selected-text recolor / IME underlines / the caret bar — retained scene state, never composed elements (0 alloc in phases 6–13).

public struct TextEditState

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
